title: polyotus obovatus
intro: Polyotus obovatus, also known as the Indian earthball or polytus, is a type of fungus that belongs to the genus Polyotus, characterized by its round, earthy-colored cap and short stem. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polyotus obovatus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Polyotus obovatus can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
